verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We are standing Under an open heaven, Where the blessing of the Lord is all over us. x2

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: There is no limit To what God can do He will do the impossible, For me and You.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Open heaven, Open heaven, All over us.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Open heaven, We are standing, Under an Open heaven.
